prompt: Create a luminous vertical anime-style illustration of a young woman in side profile walking through a bright, dreamlike city street with her small black cat companion. The girl is centered slightly left, shown from about mid-thigh up to full body crop, facing left with a calm, introspective expression. She has long, messy, windblown dark brown hair with golden sunlit ends, loose curls and strands around her face, and wears an oversized white loose jacket or blouse over a dark skirt. A large dark shoulder bag hangs from her right shoulder at her side, and she loosely holds a small rounded handbag near her thigh. At the lower right, include exactly one small black cat sitting or walking beside her, wearing a subtle red collar and looking upward or forward. Use a high-key backlit composition with the sun behind her head and hair, creating glowing rim light, translucent highlights, and a washed-out cream-white atmosphere. Surround the scene with many soft floating translucent circles and bokeh-like bubbles in pale blue, yellow, peach, and gray, layered over the foreground and background like watercolor stains. The background should suggest a bright pedestrian street or plaza with only vague architectural shapes and watercolor splashes, not detailed buildings. Style: delicate Japanese anime illustration, painterly watercolor and gouache texture, loose expressive brushwork, pastel color splashes, soft edges, airy composition, emotional and poetic mood, no text, no border, no watermark.
